category_sources: source_facts.description says hadolint is a Dockerfile linter to validate best practices; official README describes Hadolint as a smarter Dockerfile linter.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hadolint; official README title is Hadolint - Haskell Dockerfile Linter.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides how-to-use, install, CLI, configure, rules, and development documentation.
